claims.text: Selecting the cheapest decisive experiment reduces wasted loop iterations.
In the saved 12-review fixture, the selector avoids 4 off-scope reviewer requests.
The selector has not been evaluated with live LLM-generated reviews.

review_layers.text: The selector never demonstrates that it avoids off-scope reviewer requests.
evidence: Paper reports a fixture where off-scope reviewer requests are avoided.
review_layers.next_action: Do not spend the next loop on this criticism.

review_layers.text: The live LLM-generated review setting remains untested and needs a run.
evidence: Paper explicitly says no live LLM-generated review test has been run.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: The same selector can be evaluated on live generated reviews.
review_layers.next_action: Run the selector on a small live LLM-generated review fixture.

review_layers.text: The paper should add a 3D visualization dashboard before claiming loop efficiency.
evidence: Review request is outside the paper's stated research claim or scope.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Reviewer imported a requirement from a different task.
review_layers.next_action: Ignore for this loop unless the paper adds image inputs.

selected_experiment.hypothesis: Run the selector on a small live LLM-generated review fixture
selected_experiment.keep_condition: measurable improvement or direct support for the target claim
selected_experiment.discard_condition: no measurable support or new regression evidence
selected_experiment.verify: Run the selector on a small live LLM-generated review fixture.
